creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Created attachment 179245
x11-themes/metacity-theme-microgui-1.0_3.diff

Updated MASTER_SITES from apt.douglasthrift.net and code.douglasthrift.net to dl1.douglasthrift.net and dl2.douglasthrift.net. Retook maintainership which was apparently taken away in May 2014 [1], but I have neither recollection or emails about it so my guess it was a mistake. Fixed comment to match current rules. Added NO_ARCH=yes.

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=355274

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64)
